tests.name: if_then_branch
tests.description: if true then 'yes' else 'no' should evaluate to 'yes'
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { (if true then "yes" else "no") == "yes" };

tests.name: if_else_branch
tests.description: if false then 'yes' else 'no' should evaluate to 'no'
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { (if false then "yes" else "no") == "no" };

tests.name: if_with_has_guard
tests.description: if principal has role then principal.role else 'anonymous' with role present
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { (if principal has role then principal.role else "anonymous") == "admin" };

tests.name: if_with_has_guard_fallback
tests.description: if principal has role then principal.role else 'anonymous' without role
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { (if principal has role then principal.role else "anonymous") == "anonymous" };

tests.name: if_with_comparison_cond
tests.description: if context.age >= 18 then true else false
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { if context.age >= 18 then true else false };

tests.name: if_with_comparison_cond_false
tests.description: if context.age >= 18 then true else false when age < 18
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { if context.age >= 18 then true else false };

tests.name: if_integer_result
tests.description: if-then-else returning integers used in comparison
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { (if context.premium then 100 else 10) >= 50 };

tests.name: if_integer_result_else
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { (if context.premium then 100 else 10) >= 50 };

tests.name: if_in_forbid
tests.policy:
permit (principal, action, resource);
forbid (principal, action, resource) when { if context.restricted then true else false };

tests.name: if_non_bool_cond_denies
tests.description: if-then-else with non-boolean condition should produce error
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { if "not_a_bool" then true else false };

tests.name: if_nested
tests.description: nested if-then-else: if cond1 then (if cond2 then a else b) else c
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { (if true then (if false then "a" else "b") else "c") == "b" };

tests.name: if_cond_error_denies
tests.description: if cond produces error (missing attr), policy does not apply
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { if context.missing > 0 then true else false };
